name: codex-shell-path-manager
description: Install, verify, and roll back the local Codex Windows shell_path patch used to run Codex Desktop agents in Git Bash.

interface.shortDescription: Repair Codex Desktop Git Bash shell routing
interface.longDescription: A local Codex plugin that installs and maintains the patched Codex CLI needed for Windows Desktop agent sessions to honor a configured Git Bash shell_path. It detects Git Bash, can install Git for Windows with winget, configures CODEX_CLI_PATH, verifies the active setup, and rolls back to the official CLI path.
defaultPrompt: Repair my Codex Git Bash shell setup
Roll back the patched Codex CLI
